positive: A stylized, graphic illustration of a celestial mountainscape at sunset. The main subject is a symmetrical, stylized mountain range silhouetted against a vibrant gradient sky (deep indigo, magenta, gold). Include abstract elements like crescent moons, flowing comet tails, and small constellations forming pathways. The style should be modern, minimalist vector art with crisp lines, high contrast, and an elevated, mystical aesthetic. Focus on clean, deep silhouettes against saturated gradients. Central composition, perfect for screen printing on clothing, highly scalable, high detail, UHD, concept art, graphic novel style.
